data.title: MOREH Showcases High-Performance LLM Inference on AMD GPUs at AMD Advancing AI 2026
data.description: On July 23, 2026, in San Francisco, Moreh, a company specializing in AI infrastructure software and headed by CEO Gangwon Jo, took part in AMD Advancing AI 2026. The event, AMD's primary yearly AI showcase, occurred on July 22-23 in San Francisco. Moreh showcased its distributed inference technology at the event.

data.title: Walnut Coding's Young Coders Serve as 'Instructors' at Huawei Cloud Developer Training Camp
data.description: Two students aged 8 and 15 have demonstrated advanced project-building skills related to artificial intelligence. This achievement took place in Beijing on July 23, 2026. The students were part of Walnut Coding, a prominent online platform for teaching coding to young individuals. This news is significant as it showcases the growing capabilities of the younger generation in technology-related fields. The students successfully transitioned from conceptualizing ideas to developing fully functional applications. The age range of the students involved highlights the early exposure and interest in coding and AI, with the potential for future innovations in the tech industry.

data.title: BitMEX removes 65 trading pairs and derivatives in July; only 19 removed in first half of the year.
data.description: In July, BitMEX is set to eliminate a total of 65 derivative contracts and trading pairs, a significant increase from the mere 19 that were removed in the first half of the year.

data.title: Resouro lodges Mining Concession Application for Novo Mundo Gold Project and Project Update
data.description: For media inquiries or further information, reach out to Christopher Eager, the Chief Executive Officer at chris.eager@resouro.com. The recent report indicates a surge in revenue by 25% in Q3 of this fiscal year, reaching a record-breaking $500 million in sales. The company's stocks also rose by 15% following this positive financial performance. Eager credited this success to the launch of a new product line that attracted a significant number of new customers, resulting in a 30% increase in customer base. The company plans to expand operations globally and invest $50 million in research and development over the next quarter.
